subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, O assured leaf, in this wondrous Dispensation of the Most Glorious Beauty, may my spirit be offered up for His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ای ورقه موقنه در این دور بدیع از جمال ابهی روحی لاحبائه الفداء
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @thankfulness; gratitude
